doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document uses official-sounding California State Bar terminology, but the EAJP-2025 protocol and its legal authority appear invented and not traceable to real institutional guidance.
